sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n110078" key="faza/lh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φαζάλη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, a <sense id="n110078.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">disease</tr_> contracted in the Red Sea, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
